title: armeria × cintrana
intro: Armeria × cintrana, also known as the Cintran Sea Thrift or Alpine Sea Pink, is a hybrid flowering plant that belongs to the Plantaginaceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic agent. The health benefits of Armeria × cintrana include its potential to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
